_comment: Copy this to config.json and fill in YOUR details. config.json is gitignored and never committed. All fields are optional — omit a section to skip it.
_category_rules_comment: Personal payees -> category. [pattern, category, priority]. Higher priority wins. Use for landlord/family/etc. whose name would otherwise be mis-categorized.
_amount_rules_comment: Exact amount -> category, for fixed recurring payments to a person (e.g. rent). [amount, category, note].
_income_rules_comment: Incoming credits matching these are IGNORED (not counted as a deduction): salary sender, your own other-bank name for self-transfers, family. Everything else coming in is treated as a payback that reduces spend.
income_rules: self-transfer from my own other bank
